message:
test(db-runtime): add LRU cache unit tests

Add 30 tests covering LRU cache functionality:
- Constructor validation (maxSize requirements)
- Set and get operations with various types
- Has method (non-mutating lookup)
- LRU eviction policy verification
- Access pattern reordering (get/set updates order)
- Delete and clear operations
- Size tracking
- Iterator methods (entries, keys, values)
- forEach callback
- Chainable set returns
- Edge cases (undefined/null values, rapid insertions)

Total tests: 357 -> 387

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
